name: JAKKS PACIFIC INC
business: JAKKS PACIFIC INC designs, markets, and distributes toys, costumes, and consumer products under licenses from third parties. Its products include character-related and theme-related items based on movies, television, video games, and other media. The company sells primarily to large retailers such as Target and Walmart, and also has international sales.

exposures.sentence: Sales of products under trademarks or trade or brand names licensed from others account for substantially all of our net sales.

The success of many of our character-related and theme-related products depends upon the popularity of characters in books, movies, television programs, video games, live sporting exhibitions, and other media and events.
consumer shopping habits migrating from traditional brick & mortar retailer browsing to more online experiences.
